scripts.dev: pnpm ensure-stack && tsx scripts/with-env.ts turbo dev
scripts.dev:clean: tsx scripts/with-env.ts tsx scripts/kill-ports.ts HB_VITE_PORT HB_API_PORT
scripts.test: pnpm ensure-stack && tsx scripts/with-env.ts turbo test
scripts.test:all: pnpm ensure-stack && tsx scripts/with-env.ts turbo test --continue
scripts.test:api: pnpm ensure-stack && tsx scripts/with-env.ts turbo test --filter=@hushbox/api
scripts.test:web: pnpm ensure-stack && tsx scripts/with-env.ts turbo test --filter=@hushbox/web
scripts.test:crypto: pnpm ensure-stack && tsx scripts/with-env.ts turbo test --filter=@hushbox/crypto
scripts.test:shared: pnpm ensure-stack && tsx scripts/with-env.ts turbo test --filter=@hushbox/shared
scripts.test:db: pnpm ensure-stack && tsx scripts/with-env.ts turbo test --filter=@hushbox/db
scripts.test:realtime: pnpm ensure-stack && tsx scripts/with-env.ts turbo test --filter=@hushbox/realtime
scripts.test:ui: pnpm ensure-stack && tsx scripts/with-env.ts turbo test --filter=@hushbox/ui
scripts.test:coverage: pnpm ensure-stack && tsx scripts/with-env.ts turbo test:coverage
scripts.preview: pnpm ensure-stack && tsx scripts/with-env.ts tsx scripts/preview.ts
scripts.open:preview: tsx scripts/with-env.ts tsx scripts/open-url.ts http://localhost: HB_PREVIEW_PORT
scripts.e2e: pnpm ensure-stack && tsx scripts/with-env.ts playwright test
scripts.e2e:quick: pnpm ensure-stack && tsx scripts/with-env.ts playwright test --project=chromium --project=iphone-15
scripts.e2e:fast: pnpm ensure-stack && tsx scripts/with-env.ts playwright test --project=iphone-15 --retries=0
scripts.e2e:failed: pnpm ensure-stack && tsx scripts/with-env.ts playwright test --last-failed
scripts.e2e:auth: pnpm ensure-stack && tsx scripts/with-env.ts playwright test e2e/auth/ --project=chromium
scripts.e2e:chat: pnpm ensure-stack && tsx scripts/with-env.ts playwright test e2e/chat/ --project=chromium
scripts.e2e:billing: pnpm ensure-stack && tsx scripts/with-env.ts playwright test e2e/billing/ --project=chromium
scripts.e2e:sharing: pnpm ensure-stack && tsx scripts/with-env.ts playwright test e2e/sharing/ --project=chromium
scripts.e2e:group: pnpm ensure-stack && tsx scripts/with-env.ts playwright test e2e/group/ --project=chromium
scripts.e2e:ui: pnpm ensure-stack && tsx scripts/with-env.ts playwright test e2e/ui/ --project=chromium
scripts.e2e:mobile: pnpm ensure-stack && tsx scripts/with-env.ts playwright test e2e/mobile/ --project=iphone-15
scripts.e2e:api: pnpm ensure-stack && tsx scripts/with-env.ts playwright test e2e/api/ --project=chromium
scripts.db:up: tsx scripts/with-env.ts docker compose up -d --wait postgres neon-proxy redis serverless-redis-http minio && tsx scripts/with-env.ts docker compose up -d minio-setup
scripts.generate:readme: pnpm generate:icons && pnpm generate:banner && pnpm generate:tables && pnpm generate:problem-flow && tsx scripts/readme/generate-readme.ts
scripts.mobile:test: pnpm ensure-stack && tsx scripts/with-env.ts tsx scripts/mobile-test.ts
scripts.mobile:test:smoke: pnpm ensure-stack && tsx scripts/with-env.ts tsx scripts/mobile-test.ts --smoke
